title: T-053 — UI: TEC-087 Tooling/Equipment Setup List
prompt: Build tooling/equipment setup list per §12A. Generic equipment configuration list (oven config / reactor setup / dieset). Match `tooling_screen` prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:314-352. UX-MISSING — parity reference falls back to prototype. RED tests/ui/tec-087-tooling.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-087-tooling.test.tsx`. Prototype naming red-line: translate any legacy prototype/domain labels `fa`/`FA5100`/Factory Article to canonical `fg`/FG, any `PR-code` wording to WIP/intermediate, and any `process_stage`/`process_code` to `manufacturing_operation_name`; do not introduce legacy field names in final code, labels, tests or schemas.

pipeline_inputs.details: List + create/edit drawer. Uses generic ext_jsonb storage on a tooling_setups table — assumed to exist in 02-SETTINGS or be created via existing reference_schemas.
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:314-352, then list columns, search, and Create CTA match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given empty state, when rendered, then empty copy and Create CTA appear.
Given Create clicked, when submitted, then row appears in list.

UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + create flow.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not invent fields beyond prototype.

Prototype naming red-line: translate any legacy prototype/domain labels `fa`/`FA5100`/Factory Article to canonical `fg`/FG, any `PR-code` wording to WIP/intermediate, and any `process_stage`/`process_code` to `manufacturing_operation_name`; do not introduce legacy field names in final code, labels, tests or schemas.
